segments.text: And to the angel of the church in Sardis write,
‘These things says He who has the seven Spirits of God and the seven stars: I know your works, that you have a name that you are alive, but you are dead.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Be watchful, and strengthen the things which remain, that are ready to die, for I have not found your works perfect before God.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Remember therefore how you have received and heard; hold fast and repent. Therefore if you will not watch, I will come upon you as a thief, and you will not know what hour I will come upon you.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: You have a few names even in Sardis who have not defiled their garments; and they shall walk with Me in white, for they are worthy.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: He who overcomes shall be clothed in white garments, and I will not blot out his name from the Book of Life; but I will confess his name before My Father and before His angels.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: He who has an ear, let him hear what the Spirit says to the churches.”
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: And to the angel of the church in Philadelphia write,
‘These things says He who is holy, He who is true, He who has the key of David, He who opens and no one shuts, and shuts and no one opens:
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: I know your works. See, I have set before you an open door, and no one can shut it; for you have a little strength, have kept My word, and have not denied My name.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Indeed I will make those of the synagogue of Satan, who say they are Jews and are not, but lie—indeed I will make them come and worship before your feet, and to know that I have loved you.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Because you have kept My command to persevere, I also will keep you from the hour of trial which shall come upon the whole world, to test those who dwell on the earth.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Behold, I am coming quickly! Hold fast what you have, that no one may take your crown.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: He who overcomes, I will make him a pillar in the temple of My God, and he shall go out no more. I will write on him the name of My God and the name of the city of My God, the New Jerusalem, which comes down out of heaven from My God. And I will write on him My new name.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: He who has an ear, let him hear what the Spirit says to the churches.”
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: And to the angel of the church of the Laodiceans write,
‘These things says the Amen, the Faithful and True Witness, the Beginning of the creation of God:
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: I know your works, that you are neither cold nor hot. I could wish you were cold or hot.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: So then, because you are lukewarm, and neither cold nor hot, I will vomit you out of My mouth.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Because you say, ‘I am rich, have become wealthy, and have need of nothing’—and do not know that you are wretched, miserable, poor, blind, and naked—
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: I counsel you to buy from Me gold refined in the fire, that you may be rich; and white garments, that you may be clothed, that the shame of your nakedness may not be revealed; and anoint your eyes with eye salve, that you may see.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: As many as I love, I rebuke and chasten. Therefore be zealous and repent.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Behold, I stand at the door and knock. If anyone hears My voice and opens the door, I will come in to him and dine with him, and he with Me.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: To him who overcomes I will grant to sit with Me on My throne, as I also overcame and sat down with My Father on His throne.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: He who has an ear, let him hear what the Spirit says to the churches.”
segments.speaker: Jesus
